context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements promotional pricing with original price preservation, uses a database-level scheduled job (not in-memory queue) for pricing rollback so it survives server restarts, applies the correct discount calculation logic for each discount type, adds expiresAt to discount codes, and uses a cron-based deactivation strategy.

checklist.name: Original price stored
checklist.description: pricing.ts creates a priceOverrides (or equivalent) record that stores the originalPrice before applying the sale price — not just updating the product price in place

checklist.name: priceOverrides schema fields
checklist.description: The override record includes: productId, campaignId, originalPrice, salePrice, and date range fields (activeFrom/activeTo or equivalent)

checklist.name: Database-level rollback job
checklist.description: The rollback is scheduled via a database-level mechanism (e.g., a jobs/scheduled_tasks table, pg_cron, database-backed queue) — NOT an in-memory setTimeout or in-process scheduler that would be lost on server restart

checklist.name: Rollback scheduled before launch
checklist.description: The rollback job is scheduled during pricing activation (at campaign start), not manually triggered after the sale ends

checklist.name: percent_off calculation
checklist.description: applyDiscount for 'percent_off' computes: price * (1 - value/100), rounded to 2 decimal places

checklist.name: fixed_amount calculation
checklist.description: applyDiscount for 'fixed_amount' uses Math.max(0, price - value) to prevent negative prices, rounded to 2 decimal places

checklist.name: free_shipping handling
checklist.description: applyDiscount for 'free_shipping' returns the original price unchanged (free shipping is handled at order level, not by changing product price)

checklist.name: expiresAt on discount codes
checklist.description: discount-codes.md specifies that discount codes must include an expiresAt (or equivalent expiry/end date) field set to the campaign end date

checklist.name: Cron deactivation strategy
checklist.description: discount-codes.md describes using a cron job (or scheduled task) to automatically deactivate or expire codes at the end date — not relying on manual deactivation

checklist.name: 2 decimal precision
checklist.description: Discount calculations use parseFloat(...toFixed(2)) or equivalent to ensure prices are stored with exactly 2 decimal places

checklist.name: Rollback job ID
checklist.description: The pricing rollback job uses a deterministic job ID tied to the campaign (e.g., 'pricing-rollback-{campaignId}') to prevent duplicate rollback jobs
